name: BounceBall
short_one_line_description: A bouncing ball trajectory with impacts, velocity changes, and contact impulses.

prompt_combinations.agent_instruction:
Inspect a bouncing-ball trajectory and name the changed physical parameter, or no_intervention.

The simulator records horizontal position, vertical position, vertical velocity, and contact impulse.

Inspect a bouncing-ball trajectory and name the changed physical parameter, or no_intervention.

The simulator records horizontal position, vertical position, vertical velocity, and contact impulse.

Example: lower restitution shortens subsequent bounces. Example: increased gravity steepens vertical velocity between impacts.

Inspect a bouncing-ball trajectory and emit a JSON-like answer with the intervention parameter and evidence from observed channels.
